aiSlopCleaner.evidence: Bounded ai-slop-cleaner pass over changed CI/docs/test/build files. Behavior lock: SDK resilience, UI accessibility, mesh E2E, Tauri preflight/profile/runtime tests, YAML parse, compose config, ruff/typecheck/py_compile/cargo. Cleanup plan: remove stale issue gates, preserve useful checks as durable tests/workflows, fix review-found fallback/permission/logging/docs drift. Fallback findings: prepare-sidecar uv fallback is grounded fail-safe for missing uv and preserves error status; Android/native fallback entries are domain evidence, not masking fallback; release.yml semantic-release fallback masking was removed. No new dependencies. No masking fallback remains in reviewed scope. UI/design findings: N/A.

commands: uv run --with pyyaml python - <<'PY' ... workflow YAML parse ... PY
uv run python -m py_compile scripts/check_sdk_backend_conformance.py scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py scripts/build.py
uv run ruff check scripts/build.py scripts/check_sdk_backend_conformance.py scripts/mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py tests/e2e/test_mesh_gap_e2e_harness.py tests/e2e/test_tauri_sidecar_profiles.py
